name: flightdeck
description: Operational protocol for AI-assisted engineering sessions — preflight, scenario triggers, write gate, and landing ritual

interface.shortDescription: Operational protocol for AI-assisted engineering sessions
interface.longDescription: Flightdeck gives your AI assistant a persistent operational protocol across sessions — a directory convention plus a protocol for preflight, scenario-based triggers, strict write gating, and landing ritual. The next session knows what you were doing, why, and what to do next.
defaultPrompt: What were we working on last session?
Pick up the thread from flightdeck/cockpit.md and continue.
